title: Podman errors when stopping the container
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
Podman intermittently throws errors when I m stopping the container.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Create the container
```
[root@podman-test-server opc]#  podman create -t -i \
>  --cgroupns=private \
>  --hostname test1 \
>  --privileged=false  \
>  --memory 16G \
>  --memory-swap 32G \
>  --restart=always \
>  --systemd=true \
>  --name test1  \
>  oraclelinux:8
```

2. Assign bridge network create locally on podman host to the container
```
[root@podman-test-server opc]#  podman start test1
[root@podman-test-server opc]#  podman network connect test_nw2  test1
[root@podman-test-server opc]#  podman network connect test_nw3 test1
[root@podman-test-server opc]#  podman network disconnect podman test1
```
3. stop the container
```
podman stop test1
```
**Describe the results you received:**
root@podman-test-server opc]# podman stop test1
ERRO[0000] Error deleting network: running [/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-1e45509069c6d8321d067692 --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.4 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-1e45509069c6d8321d067692 
ERRO[0000] Error while removing pod from CNI network "test_nw2": running [/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-1e45509069c6d8321d067692 --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.4 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-1e45509069c6d8321d067692 
ERRO[0000] unable to cleanup network for container 3e40029b483024dfef90ad339aa48394d2ad19f9b61193d5f14bbe47a779d377: "error tearing down CNI namespace configuration for container 3e40029b483024dfef90ad339aa48394d2ad19f9b61193d5f14bbe47a779d377: running [/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-1e45509069c6d8321d067692 --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.4 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-1e45509069c6d8321d067692\n" 
3e40029b483024dfef90ad339aa48394d2ad19f9b61193d5f14bbe47a779d377

**Describe the results you expected:**


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

```
Version:      2.2.1
API Version:  2
Go Version:   go1.14.12
Built:        Fri Feb 19 11:46:00 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body: Unable to reproduce with Podman built from master as of 76c857704053a6c6ee1e2ed1900b549d399f967d
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I'm closing this as @jwhonce was unable to replicate with main branch ... please re-open if it is not.
